subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.37
question_html:
What is the product of the reaction of propanal with lithium aluminium hydride, LiAlH4?

A.  Propanoic acid

B.  Propanone

C.  Propan-1-ol

D.  Propan-2-ol
examiners_html: 69% of the candidates identified the product of the reaction of propanal with LiAlH4. The question had strong correlation with high-scoring candidates.
